main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'defect glue line lot + progressive delamination + increased salt passage compromised barrier' literal.

recommended_action.justification: Suspender T-04 + autopsia + reemplazar 5 elementos + antiincrustante 3.5 ppm temporal — match gold.

requested_data.justification: Pide autopsia estado glue line + integridad capa barrera — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi: autopsia sin defectos glue + conductividad estabiliza → switch.
